_comment: Edit the values below to control the blank screen / screen saver behaviour.
_screensaverMode_comment: 'drift' = text drifts slowly around to protect the display (recommended). 'blank' = pure black screen.
_driftText_comment: The text that drifts around the screen in drift mode. Change to your cafe name or logo text.
_idleTimeoutMinutes_comment: Minutes of no interaction before the screen goes blank. Set to 0 to disable idle blanking.
_scheduledBlankPeriods_comment: Time ranges (24-h HH:MM) when the screen should always be blank regardless of activity. Add more objects to the array for additional periods. Set enabled:false to skip a period without deleting it.
